title: Matowo's Invisible Armor
description: Flex your skin without losing armor in a friendly vanilla way!
body:
## About 🔍 Matowo's Invisible Armor is a lightweight mod that allows you to show your skin by using invisible armors; **all armors can be made invisible, and all invisible armors can be customized with trims!** Not only can you upgrade your armor into invisible ones, but **you can also make your horse armor and elytras invisible too!**


## Features 📚 This mod adds two new craftable smithing templates that let you upgrade your armor, horse armor, and elytra to invisible versions —or reverse their invisibility— using a smithing table.
### Crafting Recipes:

### Smithing Recipes:
- To convert a **regular item into an invisible one**, simply **place an Invisible Armor Smithing Template, the item you wish to upgrade, and a copper ingot in their respective slots**—and voilà!




- **To revert an invisible item to its visible form,** just **use a visible armor smithing template along with the item and a copper ingot** in the smithing table.



## Mod Compatibility ⚙️ ### You can make armors from other mods invisible! - _Heavy Chestplate from [Immersive Armors](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-armors) invisible transform:_

- _Some mods that add armors and use libraries (for example, Geckolib) may have certain bugs when making them invisible:_



- _**⚠️: Only player modded armors are supported at the moment!**_

## Language 🌎
Translated in the following languages: - _English (US) / English (United Kingdom) / English (Canada) / English (New Zealand) / English (Australia)_ - _Español (Chile) / Español (México) / Español (Argentina) / Español (Uruguay) / Español (España) / Español (Ecuador) / Español (Venezuela)_ - _Português (Brasil) / Portguês (Portugal)_ - _Français (France) / Français (Canada)_ - _Italiano (Italia)_ - _Dansk (Danmark)_ - _Schwiizerdutsch (Switzerland)_ - _Deutsch (Deutschland)_ - _Bokmål (Norge)_ - _Svenska (Sverige)_
Feel free to use this however you like as long as you give me credit! ( ͡~ ͜ʖ ͡°)
except for anything lowkey illegal lol
